hero.title: Outcome-Focused Practice Management for Cash Care Physical Therapy
hero.subtitle: Scheduling, booking, intake documentation, and analytics — built specifically for direct-to-patient clinics.

problem.label: The Cash Care Reality
problem.headline: Running a Direct-to-Patient Clinic Shouldn’t Require Five Different Tools.
problem.intro: Cash care clinics operate differently — but most software wasn’t built with that in mind.
items: Too many disconnected tools to manage scheduling, intake, and payments.
Manual scheduling that leads to missed appointments and lost revenue.
Clunky intake workflows that frustrate patients.
Limited insight into performance and growth.
Software designed for insurance billing — not direct care.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.headline: One Unified Platform Built for Cash Care Clinics.
solution.intro: Sofron replaces disconnected tools with a streamlined system designed specifically for direct-to-patient practices.

features.title: Scheduling
features.description: Flexible clinic scheduling built for independent practitioners.

features.title: Booking
features.description: Simple, patient-friendly booking designed to reduce no-shows.

features.title: Documentation
features.description: Intake forms and documentation workflows tailored for cash care.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Clear operational visibility into performance and growth.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.headline: Set Up. Accept Bookings. Run Your Practice.
howItWorks.intro: Sofron is designed to get your clinic operational quickly — without complicated onboarding.

steps.title: Set Up Your Clinic
steps.description: Configure services, availability, pricing, and intake workflows in minutes.

steps.title: Accept Patient Bookings
steps.description: Patients book seamlessly through a direct, easy-to-use scheduling interface.

steps.title: Run and Optimize
steps.description: Track performance, manage documentation, and operate with full visibility.

cta.headline: Built for Clinics That Value Independence.
cta.subtext: Sofron is currently in pre-release. Explore the demo or register your interest to receive early updates.

hero.headline: Why Cash Care Clinics Need Different Software.
hero.subtext: Cash care physical therapy operates on a different model — but most practice management tools weren’t built for it.

whatIs.label: What Is Cash Care PT?
whatIs.text: Cash care physical therapy clinics operate without insurance billing. Patients pay directly for services, allowing clinics to focus on outcomes, transparency, and patient experience.

traditional.label: Why Traditional Software Falls Short
points: Built primarily for insurance workflows and claims processing.
Overcomplicated systems designed for billing complexity.
Poor patient experience with outdated intake flows.

needs.label: What Cash Care Clinics Actually Need

hero.headline: A Modular Platform for Independent Clinics.
hero.subtext: Use what you need. Expand as you grow. Sofron is designed to adapt to the way cash care clinics operate.

features.title: Scheduling
features.description: Flexible weekly scheduling, availability controls, and override management built for direct care models.

features.title: Booking
features.description: A simple, patient-first booking flow designed to reduce friction and no-shows.

features.title: Documentation
features.description: Streamlined intake forms and digital documentation tailored to cash care workflows.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Clear operational insight into appointments, performance, and growth metrics.
